title: Alderaanian Expedition (disambiguation)
content:
'''Alderaanian Expedition''' can refer to several expeditions:
*'''[[Fifth Alderaanian Expedition]]''', this included the discovery of [[Hijarna]].
*'''[[Tenth Alderaanian Expedition]]''', this included the discovery of [[Mrisst/Legends|Mrisst]].
*'''[[Twelfth Alderaanian Expedition]]''', this included the first contact with the [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] [[Species/Legends|species]].

{{Disambig}}
